message:
fix: use prefix match for exec deny patterns and tighten session segment EOF error handling

extensions: Change deny_patterns from contains() to starts_with() so
patterns like "rm" do not falsely block commands like "firmware_update".
Fix doc comment to say "prefix match" instead of "substring match".

session_store_v2: Report segment parse errors at EOF when trailing
newline is present, only silently swallowing truncated-write errors
where both at_eof and missing_newline are true.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
